objective_overview.instruction: OVERVIEW: Single objective. Generate 1 objective — you must complete it to win.
OVERVIEW: Two objectives, BOTH required. Generate 2 objectives with separate time constraints. Complete both to win (any order). Bonus: a random crew member gets +1 XP if both achieved.
OVERVIEW: Two objectives, complete ONE. Generate 2 objectives with separate time constraints. Complete either to win. No need to choose in advance. No extra reward for both.

specific_objectives.instruction: OBJECTIVE: Access*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Acquire*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Defend*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Deliver*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Eliminate*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Fight Off*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Investigate. Place 6 markers evenly (none within 6" of edge). When crew moves within 1", remove marker and roll D6. If roll <= markers removed so far, objective achieved.
OBJECTIVE: Move Through*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Patrol*. As core rulebook p.90.
OBJECTIVE: Protect*. As core rulebook p.91. Ignore the reward for fast mission completion.
OBJECTIVE: Rescue. Place figure 1D6" from center. Ignored by enemies until crew moves within 1". Then treated as VIP (Protect rules). Acts immediately when freed. Must reach table edge to complete.
OBJECTIVE: Secure*. As core rulebook p.91.
OBJECTIVE: Search*. As core rulebook p.91.
OBJECTIVE: Sneak. Place objective 1D6" from center. To complete: crew member must begin activation within 1" of objective AND not within Line of Sight of any enemy.
OBJECTIVE: Sweep. Place 3 objectives evenly (none within 6" of edge). If crew begins activation within 1" and no enemies within 4", remove objective. All 3 removed = success.

time_constraints.instruction: TIME: Objective must be completed in the first 6 rounds.
TIME: Objective must be completed in the first 5 rounds.
TIME: Objective must be completed in the first 4 rounds.
TIME: No time limit. Extraction unknown — do not roll extraction until objectives are completed.

extraction.instruction: EXTRACTION: Mission ends immediately upon objective completion.
EXTRACTION: Exit across any battlefield edge.
EXTRACTION: Exit across any battlefield edge within the next 3 rounds, or you fail the mission.
EXTRACTION: Exit across the battlefield edge you arrived from.
EXTRACTION: 4 additional basic enemies arrive from the opposing edge. Mission ends when all figures exit any edge OR after 3 game turns.

patron_conditions.instruction: CONDITION: Collateral Damage Restriction*. Cannot deploy weapons with Shot 3+ or Damage 2+.
CONDITION: Gas Leaks. Non-Area weapons fire creates 2" gas cloud around shooter and target. Persists rest of round, blocks visibility.
CONDITION: Special Ammo Required*. All non-Area weapons restricted to 1 Shot per round.
CONDITION: Explosive Weapon Restriction*. No Area weapons may be deployed.
CONDITION: Hacking Required to Enter. Crew begins off-map. Each character must roll 6+ on 1D6+Savvy to enter from your edge. Roll each round start. If all fail, select one to enter.
CONDITION: Have to Look Humane*. No Melee weapons may be deployed.
CONDITION: Light Weapons Only*. Only Pistol and Melee weapons may be deployed.
CONDITION: Cautious Progress Required*. No Jump, Flight, or Teleport devices may be deployed.
CONDITION: Heavy Gear Impractical*. No Armor may be deployed.
CONDITION: Erratic Lighting. At start of each phase (Quick/Enemy/Slow), roll 2D6 for max visibility in inches.
CONDITION: Electronic Interference. No Screens or Gunsights may be deployed.
CONDITION: Environmental Protection Gear Required. Except Engineers and Soulless, no character may Dash.
CONDITION: Organics Only*. No Bots or Soulless may be deployed.
CONDITION: No Psionics*. No Psionics may be deployed.

CONDITION: Flash Flooding. Marker on random edge. Each round, move 1D3" toward opposite edge. Area between marker and initial edge is flooded — any character there washed away (removed, no damage/injury).
CONDITION: Unstable Ground. End of each round, D6: on 1, tremors. All ground characters Stunned. Characters on terrain within 1" of edge: D6 > base Speed = fall down.
CONDITION: Watch Your Shots*. No more than 3 crew may fire a weapon each round.
CONDITION: Scan Before You Progress*. No more than 3 crew may move each round.
CONDITION: Special Vision Required. Helmet visors limit visual range to 8+Savvy" (8" for enemies).
CONDITION: Strict Rules of Engagement*. Cannot shoot targets unless they shot at your crew last round OR are within 6".

quest_progression.instruction: QUEST: Track down info source. Costs 1D6 credits. Until paid, cannot progress Quest. Once paid, receive 1 Quest Rumor.
QUEST: Analyze data. Generate research points = combined crew Savvy + 1D6. If total >= 20, receive 1 Quest Rumor. Otherwise, accumulate each turn until you reach 20. Cannot progress Quest until done.
QUEST: Tough fight ahead. Random enemy, +2 numbers, -1 Panic range. Fight at any time but cannot progress Quest until done. If you Hold the Field, receive 1 Quest Rumor.
QUEST: Hard work required. New crew task: 'Work on the Quest'. Once 6 such tasks performed (over multiple turns), receive 1 Quest Rumor. Cannot progress until done.

QUEST: Find data cache. Set up normal Opportunity mission with Access objective. Enemy deployed within 3" of objective, crew at least 12" away. When completed, receive 1 Quest Rumor. Cannot progress until done.

QUEST: Data cache in bad place. No-objective mission. Crew in center. Roving Threats foe. Each round, 1 basic enemy from center of each 4 edges. Roll D6/round (+1 for Engineer), track total. At 28+, end mission. +1 Quest Rumor. Cannot progress until done.
QUEST: Business contact needs help. Set up Protect mission. Enemy AI changed to Aggressive. When completed, receive 1 Quest Rumor. Cannot progress until done.
QUEST: Enemy is massing. All future Quest battles add +1 to enemy numbers (does not affect data cache missions). Add 1 Quest Rumor.
QUEST: Enemy more determined. All future Quest battles reduce enemy Panic range by -1. Add 1 Quest Rumor.

quest_conclusion.instruction: QUEST CONCLUSION: Final battle is always a Straight Up Fight, no special conditions. +1 to enemy numbers (plus Quest Progression modifiers). Enemy always accompanied by Unique Individual. Enemies will NOT test Morale — fight to the death. Rewards: roll twice for Credits (pick highest, +1), 3 Loot rolls, +1 Story Point.

connection_main_table.instruction: CONNECTION TYPE: A person you've met. Roll on Subtable 1.
CONNECTION TYPE: A place you've been. Roll on Subtable 2.
CONNECTION TYPE: A job you've done. Roll on Subtable 3.
CONNECTION TYPE: A faction or group you've met. Roll on Subtable 4.
CONNECTION TYPE: Personal connection for a random crew member (not captain). Roll on Subtable 5.

connection_subtable_1.instruction: CONNECTION 1-1*: Old friend in trouble. Enemy from Criminal Elements. Play Assault (Rival Attacks). Fail/decline = friend killed, -1 Story Point. Succeed = enemy becomes Rival, but friend joins crew (roll on all creation tables).
CONNECTION 1-2: Associate gave location of data cache. Play unlicensed salvage job. If you investigate all Points of Interest, add 2 Quest Rumors.
CONNECTION 1-3*: Former employer collecting favor. Patron Mission Objectives table. Objective in 6 rounds. +1 Specialist enemy. Success = +2 credits. May decline.

CONNECTION 1-4: Cryptic message from friend in over their head. Fight Off vs Criminal Elements. Random enemy is your friend (moves by AI, won't attack crew). Move crew within 4" = they switch sides (Reactions 1). Survive/move off edge = +1 Story Point + keep their weapons.
CONNECTION 1-5*: Old associate wants payback. Eliminate vs Hired Muscle, +2 basic enemies. Success = 1 extra Loot roll. If >5 rounds, enemy identifies you → add as Rival.
CONNECTION 1-6*: 'Anonymous' tip. Search objective. 2 fewer enemies, but at end of Round 4, 1D6 additional enemies arrive (if 5-6, 1 is specialist). Success = 1 extra Loot roll.

connection_subtable_2.instruction: CONNECTION 2-1*: Location hid something. Search vs Hired Muscle + Unique Individual. Find objective = 3 Quest Rumors.

CONNECTION 2-2*: Site overrun by critters. Roving Threat, Defend +1 numbers. Fail/decline + Invasion Threat = world auto-invaded. Fail/decline + not Invasion = +1 to future Invasion rolls on this world.
CONNECTION 2-3*: Bad guys set up in ruins. Eliminate vs Criminal Elements. +2 credits on completion.

CONNECTION 2-4*: Random crew member (not captain) has secret reason to return. Acquire objective. If THAT crew member carries item off table = +3 XP for them, +1 Story Point. If they're Swift, any Swift crew goes without you if you decline (separate mission, no credits, +2 XP each).
CONNECTION 2-5: Same place, surely coincidence. Rival Ambush mission. Pick random past Rival (or current/random if none). +2 Specialists, Panic -1. Victory = captain +3 XP.
CONNECTION 2-6*: Abandoned site, might be scavenge-worthy. Unlicensed salvage job vs Roving Threat.

connection_subtable_3.instruction: CONNECTION 3-1: Random grunt wants revenge. Prior enemy type becomes Rival, attacks immediately. Accompanied by Enemy Boss UI in addition to all normal numbers. Kill Boss = remove Rival automatically.
CONNECTION 3-2*: Employer kept your info. Patron Mission Objectives table. Roll Danger Pay and Benefits. +1 Specialist enemy. May decline after seeing details.
CONNECTION 3-3: Powerful sponsor targeting you. Random mission as normal. Enemy adds Freelancer UI (removed after Round 5). Kill Freelancer = 2 Quest Rumors.
CONNECTION 3-4*: Encrypted intel deciphered. Discard all Quest Rumors, begin Quest immediately. During Quest, D6 each mission: on 6, enemy has Secret Agent. Or sell intel for 3 credits.

CONNECTION 3-5*: Strange message referencing the job. Protect mission, VIP is Corporate Slick (core rules p.172). Success = next turn is Opportunity with random Connection. Complete THAT objective = +1 Story Point.
CONNECTION 3-6*: Contact dug up dirt on employer. Acquire vs Hired Muscle. Guards: Panic -1, if T3 → raise to T4. Complete in 5 rounds or less = 1D6 credits.

connection_subtable_4.instruction: CONNECTION 4-1*: Random Rival offers ceasefire. Fight random Opportunity mission. Panic -1, +1 basic enemy. Rival sends 1 basic figure (Reactions 2) to help. Victory = remove old Rival from roster.

CONNECTION 4-2*: Employee wants to defect from old Patron. Acquire mission — 'item' is a Scientist (core rules p.172). Placed when you 'pick up'. Acts as crew. Rescue them = Patron never works with you again, but 1 Loot roll + 1 Story Point.
CONNECTION 4-3*: Former Patron needs you. Pick prior Patron. Job offered immediately, all details rolled normally.
CONNECTION 4-4: Not sure if you're being set up. Fight same enemy as last mission (Roving Threat → Hired Muscle instead). Enemy has Secret Agent UI. All Panic -1.
CONNECTION 4-5: Former employer tips you off. Roll twice for Notable Sights (core rules p.89). At end of Round 4, any uncollected sights removed from table.
CONNECTION 4-6: Info valuable to former Patron. Win mission to claim data. Hand over = they become Persistent Patron. Sell on black market = +2 credits.

connection_subtable_5.instruction: CONNECTION 5-1*: Crew member's old enemies. Eliminate vs Criminal Elements. Random basic enemy gets +1 Toughness and +1 Combat Skill. Success = +2 XP for crew member, +1 Story Point.
CONNECTION 5-2*: Crew member's allies need protection. Patrol vs Roving Threat. No Invasion chance from this encounter. Success = +2 XP, +1 Story Point.
CONNECTION 5-3*: Something stolen from crew member's people. Access vs Criminal Elements + Enemy Boss UI. Success = +2 XP, +1 Story Point.
CONNECTION 5-4*: Need to make contact. Move Through vs Roving Threat, +1 basic enemy. Success = +2 XP, +1 Story Point.

CONNECTION 5-5*: Upset the wrong people! Hand over crew member (remove from roster) OR fight. Fight: Hired Muscle + 2 Specialists + 2 basic enemies. Raid mission (Rival Attacks). Success = +2 XP, +1 Story Point.
CONNECTION 5-6*: Crew member found promising lead. Secure objective. Success = +1 Quest Rumor, +2 XP, +1 Story Point.

pvp_battle_reason.instruction: PVP REASON: A chance encounter in the field turns hostile.
PVP REASON: The two crews were hired by opposing sides.
PVP REASON: Both crews have jobs in the same location, but one crew was hired to clear out all contacts.
PVP REASON: A long-standing personal rivalry flares up.
PVP REASON: The crews have jobs in the same location and the objectives interfere with each other.
PVP REASON: Each crew is after the same thing in this location.

pvp_initiative_uses.instruction: IP USE: Fire +1 shot with any weapon and reroll 1s to Hit. Spend before rolling.
IP USE: Double Speed for one move.
IP USE: Remove all Stun markers from a crew figure. Only when that figure is selected to act.
IP USE: Count a lost brawl as a draw instead.

pvp_third_party_deployment.instruction: 3RD PARTY: Deployed on neutral battlefield edge.
3RD PARTY: Deployed on neutral edge + 1 Specialist + 1 Lieutenant.
3RD PARTY: Deployed within 6" of the center of the battlefield.
3RD PARTY: Arrives at start of Round 3 from random neutral edge.
3RD PARTY: Roll 1D6 at start. Arrives at that round number from random neutral edge.
3RD PARTY: Deployed on neutral edge. Round 3: 1D6 additional basic enemies from same edge (if 5-6 arrive, one is specialist).

setup_rules:
EXPANDED MISSION SETUP:
Randomly select enemy deployment side.
2-foot table: Enemy within 6" of their edge. Crew arrives from opposing edge Round 1.
3-foot table: Enemy within 9" of their edge. Crew within 9" of own edge.
Objectives placed in center move 1D6" in random direction.
pvp_power_rating:
PVP POWER RATING: +1 per figure fielded, +1 per Combat Skill +2 or above, +1 per Rattle Gun or Hyper Blaster, +1 per 5+ Saving Throw or better.
Difference → Bonus IPs to outgunned side: 1-2=1, 3-4=2, 5-6=3, 7-8=4, 9+=5.

pvp_rules.setup:
PVP SETUP (pp.35-39):
- No Deployment Conditions rolled. Each player rolls+places a Notable Sight.
- Each side gets objective from Opportunity Mission Objectives table.
- Alternate deploying 2 figures (lower Power Rating starts).
- Story Points and Stars of the Story CANNOT be used.
- Seize Initiative: success = +1 bonus IP at game start (both can succeed).
pvp_rules.round_sequence:
PVP ROUND SEQUENCE:
1. Randomly determine First Player (Round 1). Token passes each round.
2. First Player rolls+assigns Reaction dice, then Second Player.
3. Fast Actions: Alternate selecting 1-2 eligible characters.
4. Enemy Actions (AI-controlled forces only, if any).
5. Slow Actions: Same alternating pattern.
End: Roll 2D6 — if < round number, battle ends next round.
pvp_rules.aftermath:
PVP AFTERMATH:
- NEVER results in Rivals. Each crew paid normally.
- No Battlefield Finds. Each crew gets 1 Loot roll (+1 if fought 5+ Power Rating).
- Injuries and Experience handled normally.
pvp_rules.three_way:
PVP THREE-WAY BATTLE:
- Roll enemy for neutral edge. +1 basic + 1 specialist to numbers.
- Always accompanied by Unique Individual (unless Roving Threat).
- Cannot agree to end battle while third party on table.
pvp_rules.instruction: PVP RULES: See Compendium pp.35-39. Each player gets 1 Initiative Point/round (spend for: +1 shot + reroll 1s, double Speed, remove Stun, draw lost brawl). Power Rating balances forces. Modified alternating activation sequence.

coop_rules.enemy_generation:
CO-OP ENEMIES:
- Each player rolls enemy type. Face BOTH types.
- Generate each normally but +2 to number encountered.
- Larger force = Wave 1. Smaller = Wave 2. If equal, randomize.
- Add 1 Unique Individual to Wave 2.
- Wave 2 arrives start of Round 3 (D6: 1-2 left, 3-4 enemy, 5-6 right edge).
- Wave 3: Roll 2D6 end of each round from Round 3. If < round number, Hired Muscle force arrives + 1 specialist + Unique Individual (D6: 1-2 left, 3-4 behind you, 5-6 right; opposite Wave 2 if same).
coop_rules.setup:
CO-OP SETUP:
- Best on 3-foot square table. Terrain: 4 large, 6 small, 4 linear.
- Forces 24"+ apart. Wave 1 deployed first, then both crews.
- Two crews on same side, 8"+ apart. NO Seize Initiative roll.
- Objective: ALWAYS Fight Off. Hold the Field to win.
- Roll Deployment Condition normally. 2 Notable Sights (1D6+3" left/right of center).
coop_rules.round_sequence:
CO-OP ROUND SEQUENCE:
- Two crews are single force. Each player rolls Reaction dice separately.
- Quick/Slow Actions: players alternate, fewer figures goes first.
- Enemies act in Enemy Actions phase per normal rules.
- From Round 6+, if table cleared of enemies, game ends (even if Wave 3 hasn't arrived).
coop_rules.tough_fight:
CO-OP TOUGH FIGHT:
- All opponents: Panic range of 1 (flee only on roll of 1).
- Each Wave separate for Morale (Wave 1 casualties only affect Wave 1).
- Cautious/Defensive AI treated as Tactical AI instead.
coop_rules.aftermath:
CO-OP AFTERMATH (if at least 1 figure Holds Field, BOTH crews win):
- Resolve Rival Status: normally.
- Get Paid: each crew +1 when rolling credits.
- Battlefield Finds: each crew may roll.
- Check Invasion: roll once, +1 per Wave with Invasion Threat.
- Loot: each crew rolls normally. One player makes extra roll — BOTH crews get that item.
coop_rules.instruction: CO-OP RULES: See Compendium pp.39-43. Two crews vs strengthened opposition. 3 enemy Waves with escalating difficulty. Objective always Fight Off. Both crews win if at least 1 figure Holds the Field.

introductory_campaign.title: Training Battle
introductory_campaign.instruction:
INTRO: TRAINING BATTLE (no campaign steps)
Straight-up fight, no objectives, no Deployment Conditions, no Notable Sights.
Enemy: 4 Starport Scum (Panic 1-3, Speed 4", Combat +0, T3, AI:A, Hand gun)
       1 Specialist (same stats, Shotgun)
Knocked-out crew recover with no consequences. No XP or post-battle.

introductory_campaign.title: Campaign Turn 1
introductory_campaign.instruction:
INTRO TURN 1: No pre-battle steps.
Enemy: 4 Security Bots (Panic 0, Speed 3", Combat +0, T5, AI:D, Hand laser)
Eager players variant: 5th bot at center of enemy edge start of Round 3, +1 XP to killer.
No Deployment Conditions/Notable Sights/Unique Individuals. +1 to Seize Initiative.
Objective: Fight Off. Bots have no Panic — must destroy all.
After: Get Paid, Battlefield Finds (if Held Field), Loot, Injuries, XP.

introductory_campaign.title: Campaign Turn 2
introductory_campaign.instruction:
INTRO TURN 2: Pre-battle — Pay Medical, limited crew tasks (Train/Trade/Recruit/Explore/Repair), Assign Equipment.
Enemy: 4 Isolationist (Panic 1-2, Speed 4", Combat +0, T3, AI:C, Colony rifle)
       1 Specialist (same, Auto rifle), 1 Leader (Panic 1-2, Speed 4", Combat +1, T4, AI:C, Hand cannon)
Roll Deployment Conditions. No Notable Sights/Unique Individuals.
Objective: Patrol. After: Pay/Finds/Loot/Injuries/XP/Purchase/Campaign Event/Character Event.

introductory_campaign.title: Campaign Turn 3
introductory_campaign.instruction:
INTRO TURN 3: Travel to new world (free this time). Starship Travel Event. New World Arrival.
Pre-battle: Upkeep, limited crew tasks, Assign Equipment.
Enemy: 3 Mercenary (Panic 1-2, Speed 5", Combat +1, T4, AI:T, Military rifle)
       1 Specialist (same, Rattle gun), 1 Leader (Speed 6", Machine pistol + Blade)
ALL enemies set up in/behind Cover. No Deployment Conditions. Roll Notable Sight.
Seize Initiative at -1. Objective: Secure.

introductory_campaign.title: Campaign Turn 4
introductory_campaign.instruction:
INTRO TURN 4: Pre-battle — full Upkeep, Find a Patron added to crew tasks, Determine Job Offers, Assign Equipment, Resolve Rumors.
Roll standard mission (Patron/Quest if available, else Opportunity).
Standard encounter/opposition rules including Unique Individuals.
Special: Any enemy Combat Skill +2 or higher reduced to +1 this mission.
If Patrons from character creation: roll job for each, pick one.
If Rumors: check if they lead to a Quest.

introductory_campaign.title: Campaign Turn 5 (Full Rules)
introductory_campaign.instruction:
INTRO TURN 5: ALL standard rules. Full pre-battle and post-battle sequences.
No more training wheels. Tutorial complete!
If using Story Track: set clock to 5 Ticks.
Collect 2 Story Points for completing the introductory campaign.
